intelligence.verdict: Parents who choose Tzu Chi are typically drawn by the values-based environment and the trilingual programme.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.3K – US$11K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: PIK campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Vegetarian cafeteria, Sports facilities.
